rules.description: Hold Caps Lock as a modifier for navigation and editing

manipulators.description: F+D+S setter: switch to jump grid
F+S+D setter: switch to jump grid

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell application process "ControlCenter" to click (first menu bar item of menu bar 1 whose description is "Clock")' &

manipulators.description: G+D+H: Chrome move tab + focus left
G+D+J: Chrome move tab + focus down
G+D+K: Chrome move tab + focus up
G+D+L: Chrome move tab + focus right
G+F+J: Chrome move tab + focus down
G+F+K: Chrome move tab + focus up
G+Y: Chrome switch to first tab
G+O: Chrome switch to last tab
G+slash: detach tab to new window

to.shell_command: URL=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to URL of active tab of front window' 2>/dev/null); [[ "$URL" == chrome://* ]] && osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to tell front window to make new tab' &

manipulators.description: G+F+Y: Chrome reorder tab to first
G+F+O: Chrome reorder tab to last
